description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a large, simple gable roof and a prominent front porch spanning the width of the house. The exterior is surrounded by several mature trees and landscaped shrubs, creating a suburban neighborhood feel. The front porch features railings and is accessible by a central walkway leading to the main entrance. Windows are arranged symmetrically on both floors, providing balanced natural light and a classic appearance. A small detached shed and a circular outdoor seating area are present in the yard, enhancing the livability of the property. The driveway and sidewalk connect the house to the street, indicating its integration into an urban or suburban context.
description: A two-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, front porch, symmetrical windows, and surrounding trees, set in a landscaped suburban yard with a shed and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yard with trees and a shed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side trees, and the shed positioned near the left edge of the property.
description_view_2: Direct front view emphasizing the central walkway, porch, and balanced window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the back of the house, additional trees, and the shed further in the background.
